sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_results("
			SELECT meta_value as original_id, GROUP_CONCAT(post_id ORDER BY post_id) as post_ids
			FROM {$wpdb->postmeta}
			WHERE meta_key = 'blocksy_original_post_id'
			GROUP BY meta_value
			HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
		")

$wpdb->get_row(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT meta_value FROM $wpdb->sitemeta WHERE meta_key = %s AND site_id = %d",
				$option,
				$network_id
			)
		)

sinks.expression:
$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"UPDATE {$wpdb->postmeta}
				SET meta_value = REPLACE(meta_value, %s, %s)
				WHERE meta_key = %s
				AND meta_value LIKE %s",
				$from_menu_link,
				$to_menu_link,
				'_menu_item_url',
				'%' . $wpdb->esc_like($from_menu_link) . '%'
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_results("
			SELECT meta_value as original_id, GROUP_CONCAT(post_id ORDER BY post_id) as post_ids
			FROM {$wpdb->postmeta}
			WHERE meta_key = 'blocksy_original_post_id'
			GROUP BY meta_value
			HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
		")

$wpdb->get_row(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT meta_value FROM $wpdb->sitemeta WHERE meta_key = %s AND site_id = %d",
				$option,
				$network_id
			)
		)
